title: Polestar PSNY Stock Price Prediction 2026 2030 Analyst Targets
text: Analysts project consensus price target of $4.09 based on 9 ratings for PSNY, suggesting approximately 68% downside from current levels trading around $20 in April 2026. Range of forecasts includes high of $15 from Barclays in January 2026 and low of $0.78 from Bernstein in August 2024. Recent average from three most recent ratings stands at $6.42. Long-term outlook for 2030 shows CoinCodex models projecting range between $12 and $22 by 2030 with wide uncertainty tied to sector disruption and regulatory changes. Overall analyst sentiment maintains cautious stance with modest long-term optimism. Consensus rating is Hold, reflecting skepticism about near-term momentum despite acknowledgment of potential recovery prospects. Key risk factors highlighted include tariff impacts on production costs and market access, ongoing cash burn and operational losses, intense EV sector competition, and supply chain vulnerabilities. For 2026 guidance, Polestar expects low double-digit volume growth with continued retail network expansion of 30%.
